ValidationRule.description: Car Currency must match Local Currency
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.DeveloperName ="CarTravel", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Car__r.CarCurrency__c, "CHF"), ISPICKVAL(LocalCurrency__c,"CHF") ) , false, IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Car__r.CarCurrency__c, "EUR"), ISPICKVAL(LocalCurrency__c,"EUR") ) , false, IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Car__r.CarCurrency__c, "USD"), ISPICKVAL(LocalCurrency__c,"USD") ) ,false,true)))
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Car Currency must match Local Currency. Please choose the correct car. (EC015)
